basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt and Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate - I Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Women candidates is applicable as per statutory guidelines and CSIR / Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. / B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, OR M.Sc. in Chemistry, OR M.Tech. / M.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, or Energy Engineering
qualification.details: B.Tech. / B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, OR M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized University or equivalent institute. M.Tech. / M.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, or Energy Engineering.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31000 + HRA or Rs. 25000 + HRA per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I position is 31st July 2026. It is advisable to submit your application well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech. / B.E. in Mechanical Engineering or Chemical Engineering, OR an M.Sc. in Chemistry, OR an M.Tech. / M.E. in Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, or Energy Engineering from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate - I post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Women candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 31,000, plus HRA, depending on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the CSIR CSMCRI Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and self-attested copies of relevant documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate - I position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for a contract-based position, meaning it is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR CSMCRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CSMCRI is located in Bhavnagar, Gujarat, with the pincode 364002.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
